template_use: Empty residual/frontier intake template only; not seeded evidence and not a novelty-harvesting license.
promotion_gate_now: Promote only when the row improves taxonomy/reviewer legibility and has either a stronger public corroboration route or a clearly bounded methods-only residual role below headline counting.
hard_exclusions: content with doxxing or intimate-abuse exposure
anomalies that do not stress taxonomy, authority, or governance interpretation
